summary: Updated kind control-plane docs to describe the NiceGUI operator console, identify scripts/web_app_hub.py as the web app entry point, and document the local uv run scripts/web_app_hub.py command. Verified the existing kind manifest renders with the preserved service identity, probes, ports, auth Secret, Hub/MCP env vars, workspace mount, grove id setup, and read-only RBAC. Marked only OpenSpec task 1.9 complete.
